Rehabilitation Laser And Surgery Comprehensive Eye Exams I recently went to this eye clinic in Delhi and it was amazing! The clinic feels really nice and the people there are friendly and helpful. Dr. Guha was really smart and kind. They explained everything in a way that was easy to understand and made me feel comfortable. Vikram Singh ABOUT Sai Retina Foundation Eye Hospital SRF Eye Hospital was founded in 2008 by Dr. Jayanto Shekhar Guha , a distinguished senior vitreo-retina surgeon with over 30 years of experience, to meet the growing need for specialized retinal care in Delhi. Over the years, the SRF Eye Hospital has become a leading eye care center in Delhi, renowned for its expertise in treating complex vitreo-retinal disorders . Our comprehensive services include laser vision correction (LASIK), advanced cataract surgeries, and cutting-edge vitreo-retinal treatments. At SRF Eye Hospital, we are committed to delivering the highest standard of care, focusing on patient-centered treatment. We strive to provide top-quality eye care solutions at affordable prices, ensuring our patients receive the best possible outcomes for their vision and eye health. Expert Ophthalmologists Advanced Diagnostic Techniques Personalised Care Comprehensive Patient Support See our video Restoring Vision, Transforming Lives Our Initiatives In response to the pressing need for accessible eye care solutions in India, the Sai Retina Foundation has launched impactful initiatives aimed at combating preventable blindness and visual impairments. These initiatives are driven by our founder’s vision to make quality eye care available to all, especially in underserved communities. Through innovative programmes like the Diabetic Retinopathy Mitigation Project in East and Northeast Delhi, we provide free eye camps and comprehensive support, striving to restore vision and transform lives. Learn More Testimonials What Our Patients Say! One Of The Best Eye Hospitals in Delhi for Normal OPD and Surgeries like Cataract Surgery, Retina Surgery, and Vitreoretinal Surgery. Dr. Pankaj Kumar Excellent Place to go for a detailed eye examination. Well equipped with all developed and state of art eye examination equipment. Dr Guha is a very experienced and meticulous doctor who has excellent knowledge of ophthalmology. I do refer this center for Retina and Cataract related issues. Debasmita Banerjee Dr. Guha is an extremely knowledgeable doctor. Sai Retina Foundation is the best place to treat retina & get cataract surgery. Clean environment and well-trained staff. I recommend this eye hospital strongly. Chitranjali Gaur One of the best eye hospitals in Delhi! Dr. Guha is an excellent senior Vitreo-retinal surgeon. He gives sufficient time to each patient. The hospital staff is very supportive. I highly recommend the Sai Retina Foundation for any and every eye issue anyone has. Preeti Dubey The clinic has all the latest stuff for checking eyes and treating problems. They use the latest machines and methods to make sure they give the best care. Overall, my visit to the eye clinic (Sai Retina Foundation) was great. If you need eye help in Delhi, definitely check them out. Vikram Singh The hospital and its staff are very supportive and kind-hearted, I will suggest you visit the place if you are suffering from any kind of eye problem, Dr. Guha's calmness and the way he deals with the patients' conditions so well. Appointment Sai Retina Foundation Eye Hospital is one of Delhi’s premier NABH pre-accredited eye care centres, dedicated to meeting all your eye care needs. Founded by Dr. Jayanto Shekhar Guha to meet the growing demand for specialised treatment of retinal disorders, our comprehensive services include LASIK, cataracts, corneal transplants, retinal diseases, glaucoma, squint correction, and oculoplasty.
